case_title: AMADO TIZANDO VS. WEN WEI SIEN HSU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIZANDO, AMADO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HSU, WEN WEI SIEN $3,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,235.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,150.00 FILED BY TIZANDO, AMADO AS TO DEFENDANT HSU, WEN WEI SIEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF . FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 SERVED NOV-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HSU, WEN WEI SIEN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HSU, WEN WEI SIEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.
